---
title: "Life Science Symposium: Data Visualization Workshop"
subtitle: "April 10, 2026"
---

## Workshop Details

In this workshop, we will learn the basics of data visualization using R and the `ggplot2` package. This workshop is intended to be a brief intro or "refresher" to these topics, and is presented as part of the [UBC Life Sciences Symposium](https://lss.lsi.ubc.ca/).  


## About the Speaker

[Dr. Grace Tompkins](https://grcetmpk.github.io/) is an Assistant Professor of Teaching at the University of British Columbia and a recent PhD graduate in Biostatistics from the University of Waterloo. Her teaching focuses on building confidence in statistics and data science by creating inclusive and supportive learning environments. Outside of the classroom, Grace shares free educational content on her YouTube channel ([@proftompkins](https://www.youtube.com/@proftompkins)) for students and the broader statistics and data science community.
